characters.name: Avery Jennings
characters.description: GenderFemaleAgeNovember 3, 199912-13 (Season 1)13-14(Season 2)15 (Season 3)ProfessionStudentFriendsLindsay(Best Friends)Max(Best Friends)Stan(Dog; best friend)Nikki OrtizDabWes ManningKarl Fink(Friends; former enemies)Kevin(Formerly)FamilyEllen Jennings(mother)Bennett James(step-father)Unnamed Biological FatherTyler James(step-brother)Chloe James(step-sister)Sigourney(aunt)Bob James(step-uncle)Marjorie(maternal grandmother)EnemiesIan CallowayIvyHeatherBrian(Ex-Boyfriend)HecklerKevinKarl Fink(Formerly)Cheri(Formerly)AliasesAves (Cheerleading squad,Lindsay)LikesPaintingBeing organizedBeing funnySchoolPuppiesThe color pinkSingingCookiesDislikesSpidersFirst appearanceStan of the HouseLatest appearanceStan's Secret Is OutPortrayerG. Hannelius Avery Jenningsis one of the two protagonists ofDog With a Blog, right next to Stan. Avery is extremely hard-working and very serious. Avery is the  step  sister ofTyler Jamesand the step  sister ofChloe James. She cares about her family and is not afraid to take risks. Avery is also a straight-A student with a perfect attendance record. InSeason 1, Avery was sophisticated and girly, with ties and collared shirts that were tucked in, sometimes with sweaters. She also wore knee socks and clogs and hair straight in this season. InSeason 2andSeason 3, her look is more funky and fun with layers. She wears more graphic tees and jeans. Her hair is curly in these seasons. Her style seems to be more girly and fashionable. Also, her hair color became more darker and less blonde. Avery is a smart, nice and sweet girl. She loves school and learning new things. She is very nice to people and loves her family and friends, especially her dog,Stan. However, she has been shown to prioritize her own feelings before her friends and family. InSeason 1, Avery was shy and a little awkward. She wanted everything to be perfect and always made rules. InSeason 2, she seems to be more confident and fun. Her style also changes a bit and is more fashionable and girly.
characters.personality_section: Avery is a smart, nice and sweet girl. She loves school and learning new things. She is very nice to people and loves her family and friends, especially her dog,Stan. However, she has been shown to prioritize her own feelings before her friends and family. InSeason 1, Avery was shy and a little awkward. She wanted everything to be perfect and always made rules. InSeason 2, she seems to be more confident and fun. Her style also changes a bit and is more fashionable and girly.

characters.name: Barry Barnes
characters.description: GenderMaleProfessionEditor/publisherFriendsMarcus (assistant)EnemiesBennett James(rival mostly)First appearanceThe Kids Find Out Stan BlogsLatest appearanceThe Kids Find Out Stan BlogsPortrayerRandy J. GoodwinBarry BarnesisBennett James' editor and boss responsible for publishing his books. Barry was in his office when he receives a phone call fromStan(unknown to him he is talking to a dog). The phone call was only made because Stan and the kids thought Bennett sent him his hard drive, which initially carried Stan's blog. And now, they try to convince him to not publish it yet. During the conversation, Stan told Barry he needed to focus, to which Barry tells his assistant Marcus to remind him to focus. Stan says hurtful things to Barry, which push him to fire Bennett after he picks up the phone and becomes disappointed about it. Realizing that Bennett never sent Barry the hard drive of Stan's blog, Stan and the kids try to find a way to fix their mistake. Stan decides to talk to him personally even if it means giving up his secret to the world.

characters.name: Bennett James
characters.description: GenderMaleAgeJune 14, 197141 (Season 1)42 (Season 2)43-44 (Season 3)ProfessionChild Psychologist/AuthorFriendsKelly and Rick StewartFamilyEllen Jennings(current wife)Unnamed Ex-Wife Or Late WifeTyler James(son)Chloe James(daughter)Avery Jennings(step-daughter)Unnamed fatherNora James(mother)Bob James (brother)Unnamed sisterEnemiesJoeCheri(formerly)AliasesDad (byAvery Jennings,Tyler JamesandChloe James)Butchie (byEllen Jennings)Daddy (byChloe JamesandEllen Jennings)B (by himself)King (by himself)Sally (byTyler James)LikesGoofing off, Writing, CarolingFirst appearanceStan of the HouseLatest appearanceStan's Secret Is OutPortrayerRegan Burns 41 (Season 1)42 (Season 2)43-44 (Season 3) Unnamed sister Bennett is the father of the Jennings/James family. He's a big-time child psychologist who has written several books, however, he's kind of a goofball (he even wanted Tyler to be featured on the cover of his next book). He always thinks he knows the best way to handle everything and comes up with some pretty unusual ways to deal with family issues. He always thinks of Chloe as a princess, himself as a king, and Ellen as a queen. Bennett is normally the more serious compared to Ellen and is shown on several occasions to be quite intelligent, partially down to being a psychologist he can normally predict her actions quite accurately.

characters.name: Big Murray
characters.description: GenderFemaleProfessionSchool MascotFamilyLittle Phyllis,Tiny HaroldDaveedLatest appearanceDog with a Hog Big Murrayis the giant pig who is the rival mascot ofAvery Jennings' rival school. He appears inDog with a Hog. He was kidnapped in an attempt to enticeStanback, who Avery mistook for a rival school abduction victim. Big Murray is the mother of Little Phyllis, Tiny Harold, and Daveed.

characters.name: Brian
characters.description: EnemiesAvery JenningsMax EdlsteinLindsayLikesMusicDislikesSpicy foodFirst appearanceGuess Who's a Cheater?Latest appearanceGuess Who's a Cheater?PortrayerKalama Epstein Brian is one of Avery's boyfriends as well as having been the boyfriend of her friends Lindsay and Max at the same time. His first and only appearance was inGuess Who's a Cheater?where it is revealed that he was dating all three girls at the same time. Despite the friends initially fighting over which one deserves to be with him, they soon realized that Brian is a jerk who doesn't deserve either of them for treating them this way. The girls plot revenge by tricking him into eating tons of spicy food, then finally give his just desert by smacking him with deserts.  He is portrayed by Kalama Epstein.

characters.name: Brie Gimmlestaub
characters.description: GenderFemaleAge16ProfessionCheerleaderFriendsAvery JenningsEllen JenningsRemyTrishMaddieFamilyNicholas Gimmlestaub (brother)Mayor Madge Gimmlestaub (mother)EnemiesLindsayLikesRummaging through the refrigerator, being sarcasticFirst appearanceGuess Who's a CheerleaderLatest appearanceAvery's Wild PartyPortrayerDara Sisterhen Brie Gimmlestaubis a member of the cheerleading squad, as well as the daughter of Pasadena's Mayor. Brie withMaddie,LindsayandAvery Brie is portrayed as very sarcastic and mean to others, although she appears to have lots of friends, most likely because her mother is the mayor. She is also not very exciting, and talks with an unsatisfied tone.

characters.name: Cheri
characters.description: ProfessionDog TrainerA clown cleaning circus cagesEnemiesJames-Jennings Family(formerly)Stan(formerly)First appearanceWho's Training Who?Latest appearanceWho's Training Who? Cheriis a character inDog With a Blogportrayed by Leigh-Allyn Baker. She is a vain, strict and nasty dog trainer who wants to take Stan to the pound after he doesn't listen to her. When Cheri was introduced, she's shown to be a very strict trainer. Cheri can be harsh to both dogs and people, as she once sprayed Bennett and called him stupid. When Cheri was introduced, she's shown to be a very strict trainer. Cheri can be harsh to both dogs and people, as she once sprayed Bennett and called him stupid. Cheri is not afraid to say what's on her mind, as she proves to be rude towards others and claiming to be in "her house". She's not afraid to yell at others as she demands to get what she wants, exerting her dominance. Cheri also takes pride of herself being a dog trainer. However, when Stan becomes the first dog who never listens to her, she loses confidence in herself, showing that no dog has ever resisted her tactics. She then proceeds to fail at training the next three dogs she was hired to train. However, the James-Jennings Family invites her over and shows Cheri that she actually did train Stan. Stan decided to give in, and obey her commands so that Cheri can gain her confidence back and become a dog trainer again.

characters.name: Chloe James
characters.description: GenderFemaleAgeApril 1, 2006(age 19)6 (Season 1)7 (Season 2)8-9 (Season 3)ProfessionElementary School StudentFriendsDarcy Stewart(currently)Stan(dog)Mason(boyfriend)Karl FinkFamilyBennett James(father)Ellen Jennings(step-mother)Tyler James(brother)Avery Jennings(step-sister)Sigourney(step-aunt)Bob James(uncle)Mrs. James (mother)EnemiesIan CallowayDarcy Stewart(formerly)Karl Fink(formerly)Cheri(formerly)AliasesLittle Red (byKarl Finkand her classmates)Princess (byBennett James)Chloe the Magnificent (by herself andBennett James)C (by herself,Ellen Jennings,Bennett JamesandAvery Jennings)Sweetheart (byBennett JamesandEllen Jennings)Cleo (bySigourney)Gayle (byEllen)Brunette Peters (by Mr. Trummer)Mrs. Grimmons (herself)Savannah Snoops (Herself)LikesCandy, dolls, poniesDislikesBeesFirst appearanceStan of the HouseLatest appearanceStan's Secret Is OutPortrayerFrancesca Capaldi Chloe Jamesis one of the two deuteragonists ofDog With a Blog. She is the youngest child ofEllen JenningsandBennett James. She is the younger sister ofAvery JenningsandTyler James. She gets along withStan, as well as her siblings. She is a rather silly and determined little girl. Chloe is portrayed byFrancesca Capaldi. Chloe is a sweet, perky, energetic, and a determined little girl. She has a very active imagination. Chloe is very nice and loves her life as well as her family. She looks up to Avery and loves her more than anything else. She also loves her brother Tyler, and being blood related, did everything she could to keep him from leaving her just so he can stay with her. Like when she stole his BMX bikes, so he wouldn't have to leave home (Guess Who Becomes President?).

characters.name: Darcy Stewart
characters.description: GenderFemaleAge13FriendsChloe JamesTyler JamesFamilyKelly and Rick Stewart(mother and father)Maximus Slamus(uncle)EnemiesChloe James(formerly)LikesStrawberries, the zoo, dolls, frozen yogurt, seeing people that she doesn't like get hurt,Tyler James, Tyler's "slybrow"DislikesChloe James(previously), Not getting what she wants, People who don't listenFirst appearanceStan's Old OwnerLatest appearanceCat With a Blog(Mentioned)PortrayerElla Anderson Tyler James Darcy Stewartis a young little girl who is best friends withChloe James. InStan's Old Owner, Chloe and Darcy got along terribly until the girls bonded over, seemingly destroying their parents' friendship. InGood Girl Gone Bad, Chloe and Darcy manipulateTylerinto giving them what they want by telling him that Darcy doesn't like him and they seem to have become best friends.

characters.name: Dustin Pitt
characters.description: GenderMaleAge12ProfessionStudentFriendsAvery Jennings(ex-girlfriend)Tyler JamesFamilyMr. and Mrs. Pitt (unknown parents)LikesBike-ridingArtFirst appearanceAvery's First CrushLatest appearanceAvery's First CrushPortrayerNoah HardenDustin PittwasAvery'scrush and later on, her first boyfriend, until they broke up inAvery's First Breakup. Dustin asks Avery to be his girlfriend Avery had a huge crush on him, so Nikki helped Avery get the attention of Dustin. After watching a movie together, Avery begins to worry that he doesn't like her, but the next day he asks her to be his girlfriend. They broke up not too long after, which was hard for Avery. He looks up to Tyler James very much, mostly because of his great bike riding skills.

characters.name: Ellen Jennings
characters.description: GenderFemaleAgeJuly 17, 197339 (Season 1)40 (Season 2)41-42 (Season 3)ProfessionMomFriendsStan(dog)Kelly and Rick StewartFamilyMarjorie Jennings (mother)Bennett James(current husband)Unnamed Ex-Husband Or Late HusbandAvery Jennings(daughter)Tyler James(step-son)Chloe James(step-daughter)Sigourney(sister)EnemiesCheri(formerly)AliasesMom (byAvery Jennings,Tyler JamesandChloe James)Mommy (byChloe JamesandBennett James)Smellen (by other moms)Queen (byBennett James)Janice (byBennett James)E (byChloe James,Bennett James,Avery Jenningsand herself)Grinchy Fun Hater (byBennett James)Pretty Lady (byBennett James)LikesCats, spending time withAvery,Stan(when he's being nice to her), sushiDislikesDogs (sometimes),Lucy,Stan(sometimes)First appearanceStan of the HouseLatest appearanceStan's Secret Is OutPortrayerBeth Littleford 39 (Season 1)40 (Season 2)41-42 (Season 3) Ellen Jenningsis one of the main characters onDog With a Blog. She is the very naïve mother of the kids. Ellen Jennings is Avery's mother and Chloe's and Tyler's step-mother. She doesn't like dogs, but does like cats, and makes it known that she doesn't like Stan, but at the end of "The Parrot Trap", she and Stan get along. Her nickname is "Smellen" to other moms due to the medley of horrific odors in her car. One of Ellen's famous quotes is saying "Good one, Ellen" after she says a witty joke. She can get hyper or very energetic as seen when she drank the "special energy drink" at the video game fair. She tries to get involved with Avery's hobbies/activities and sometimes even tries living through Avery. For example, she was obsessed with the idea of Avery becoming a cheerleader, getting the opportunity of fitting in and realizing what it was like to be popular and be a cheerleader after missing out from not making the team as a kid. She got excited when saying "goodnight" to one of the cheerleaders with her replying with "Goodnight Ells!" It is also mentioned that she is prone to suggestion. If a condition with side effects is described, she starts to "experience" those effects. Like if someone even mentions a sneeze all of a sudden she sneezes. She is a bit of a coward and neurotic. She will freak out at the slightest of provocations and is afraid of ghosts. Her paranoia once led her to believe that there was a ghost in the house who wanted to get married to her because she looks like the ghosts' ex-fiancée. But she is very family-oriented and will take care of the kids when it is necessary. She is a bit strict when it comes to Tyler's goofing off and his rebelliousness. Most animals hate her for some odd reason and whenever she tries to be nice to an animal, the animal hurts her. She once came into the vet's office and there was a poster that said "Be nice to animals, or this will happen" with pictures of her being hurt by animals. The reason she dislikes Stan is because she had a pet dog as a kid but it ran away.

characters.name: Emily Adams
characters.description: GenderFemaleAge16-17ProfessionFood Truck EmployeeFriendsTyler James(ex-boyfriend)FamilyGator(mother)The Hawk(uncle)EnemiesNikki OrtizAliasesThe BeastPlant Spitter (byTyler,AveryandNikki Ortiz)LikesBMX ridingTyler James(formerly)First appearanceTyler Gets a GrillfriendLatest appearanceLove Ty-AnglePortrayerKathryn NewtonEmily AdamsisThe Hawk's niece andTyler's ex-girlfriend. Emily is portrayed byKathryn Newton. Emily is adventurous and has a personality similar toTyler. She is very laid-back and isn't afraid to break the rules. Emily usually has long, straight blonde hair. Her hair has noticeably changed since the events ofTyler Gets a Grillfriend, where she had wavy, medium length hair. She has brown eyes and fair skin. Emily is adventurous and has a personality similar toTyler. She is very laid-back and isn't afraid to break the rules.

characters.name: Erik
characters.description: GenderMaleAge17FriendsTyler(formerly)EnemiesTylerLikesPizzaCheatingDislikesGetting into troubleHis friends tattling on himFirst appearanceGuess Who's a Cheater?Latest appearanceGuess Who's a Cheater?PortrayerLogan MillerErikis a guy who used to beTyler'sfriend. He took the accelerated program test with Tyler to graduate school early. However, oncePrincipal Lawsonfound out that their test answers are the same, he accuses Tyler of cheating due to his detention records. Erik confessed he was the one who cheated on the test to Tyler and it was easy to put the blame on him. When Tyler realized Erik wasn't a very good friend and told Principal Lawson the truth, he retook the exam and passed, while Erik was forced to retake it and failed, which got him kicked out of the accelerated program. Erik confronts Tyler about this and hypocritically tells him that friends don't do what he did, but Tyler rebukes Erik by saying they stopped being friends when he cheated off him and let him take the fall.

characters.name: Gator
characters.description: GenderFemaleProfessionFry CookFamilyEmily Adams(Daughter)The Hawk(Brother)EnemiesTyler James(Formerly)AliasesGatorDislikesbeing called LeonaFirst appearanceTyler Gets a GrillfriendLatest appearanceWill Sing for Food TruckPortrayerStephanie Hodge The Hawk(Brother) Leona "Gator" AdamsisThe Hawk's sister andEmily's mother. She is portrayed byStephanie Hodge. InTyler Gets a Grillfriend, Gator took overThe Hawk's food truck while he was away. She introducesTylerto her daughter,Emily, and mistakenly leads him to believe that she wants them to start dating. She makes it clear that she does not want Tyler dating her daughter because he is a "player", but agrees to let them date at the end of the episode after overhearingEllenandAverytalk about independence.

characters.name: Glenn
characters.description: GenderMaleProfessionShelter WorkerFriendsBossEnemiesAvery JenningsTyler JamesAliasesSome guy named Glenn don't really know him moving on (byStan)First appearanceStan of the HouseLatest appearanceStan of the HousePortrayerHarvey Guillen Glennis a man who works at the local dog shelter of Pasadena. He seems to be an animal person. He was seen in the episodeStan of the HousewhenAveryandTylerwent to retrieveStanfrom the Animal Shelter. However, he was not without being a protective man guarding his shelter, trying to prevent them from retrieving Stan.

characters.name: Heather
characters.description: GenderFemaleAgeApril 3, 1999ProfessionStudentFriendsNoneFamilyPrincess(Her dog)EnemiesJames-Jennings FamilyLindsayMaxStanGracieFreddyAliasesKarl FinkLikesThe GleeBeing in a musicalKarl FinkPrincessDislikesWatching musicalsStaveryFirst appearanceStan Falls in LoveLatest appearanceStan Rescues His PrincessPortrayerBrighid Fleming Heather is a new neighbor onSeason 3ofDog With a Blog. Her family just moved in the neighborhood. She is very stuck up, snobby and mean. She doesn't want to associate herself and her dog Princess with the Jennings-James family. She is rich and spoiled, so she doesn't like to be nice to other people. She has blonde hair and almost always wears an expensive-looking dress. She is considered to be a hypocrite as claimed to the public that she is saving animals, but actually hates puppies as she finds them to be gross and complained about Stan barking. Her main quote is, "Gross."

characters.name: Heckler
characters.description: GenderMaleEnemiesAvery JenningsFirst appearanceWill Sing for Food TruckLatest appearanceWill Sing for Food Truck Heckleror "CaptianDuckFart" is the person who writes rude and hurtful comments online aboutAvery Jennings' singing in the Food Truck commercial. Avery takes the comments very personal, butEllen Jenningshelps her get over it, so Avery can perform the song in the park in front of lots of people, including the Heckler. He appears inWill Sing for Food Truck. He is played by Alex Calloway.
